metadata.description: Plugins and skills for interacting with the Morpho lending protocol on Ethereum and Base

plugins.name: morpho-mcp
plugins.description: [Experimental] MCP server for the Morpho lending protocol — query vaults/markets, prepare transactions, and simulate outcomes on Ethereum and Base

plugins.name: morpho-cli
plugins.description: [Experimental] CLI skill for querying Morpho protocol data and building unsigned transactions — vault APYs, market rates, user positions, deposits, withdrawals, and borrows

plugins.name: morpho-builder
plugins.description: [Experimental] Builder skill for code-generation agents building Morpho integrations — deposit apps, dashboards, bots
